metaBuilds.title: AD Skirmisher
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for 10s rotation damage, online around minute 25 — about 691 damage over a 10s rotation in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +26% more 10s rotation damage: try Viper over Mindrazor (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.title: Meta Core
metaBuilds.whyLine: Evidence-only: one item in this core is not in our mechanics data yet, so the sim cannot decompose it.

metaBuilds.title: AD Burst
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for one-combo burst, online around minute 25 — about 691 damage in one combo in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +27% more one-combo burst: try Viper over Mindrazor (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Khaimera's main threat is Cull; bait it before you commit, and armor softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 27% of its bite; you give up 27% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention. Boris deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 17% of its bite; you give up 27% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: Respect their early kill threat; the exchange levels out later, so trade patiently and scale. Serath's main threat is Chastise; bait it before you commit, and armor softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 27% of its bite; you give up 27% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention. Yin's main threat is Backlash; bait it before you commit, and armor softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 27% of its bite; you give up 27% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Kallari's main threat is Guillotine; bait it before you commit, and armor softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 27% of its bite; you give up 27% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: Survive the early checkpoints, concede even trades, and take over once your spike lands. Rampage deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 17% of its bite; you give up 27% of your damage.
